content: P15-4完成：已移除所有正则回退逻辑。修改的函数包括：_rule_weak_crypto, _rule_deadlock_patterns, _rule_rand_insecure, _rule_strtok_nonreentrant, _rule_open_permissive_perms, _rule_alloca_unbounded, _rule_atoi_family, _rule_pthread_returns_unchecked, _rule_cond_wait_no_loop, _rule_inet_legacy, _rule_time_apis_not_threadsafe, _rule_thread_leak_no_join等。所有negative测试通过（无误报）。commit: 409fc2a
